headline: Princess Cruises LNG Fleet Expansion and Asia Push Might Change The Case For Investing In Carnival (CCL)
summary: In recent announcements, Carnival Corporation’s brands Princess Cruises and Holland America Line outlined major growth plans, including three next-generation LNG-powered ships for Princess and a multiyear “Holland America Evolution” program to comprehensively refresh six vessels, while Princess also unveiled its most expansive Asia deployment for 2027–2028. Together, these moves point to a broad push to upgrade guest experiences, expand regional coverage in Asia, and align future fleet...

headline: Carnival Corporation (CCL) Valuation Check After New LNG Ships And Holland America Evolution Program
summary: Carnival Corporation & (CCL) is back in focus after unveiling two major cruise initiatives: new LNG dual fuel ships for Princess Cruises and the multiyear Holland America Evolution upgrade program, which reshape its future fleet profile. See our latest analysis for Carnival Corporation &. Recent news around LNG powered newbuilds and the Holland America Evolution program comes as momentum in the share price has been mixed, with a 16.59% 1 month share price return but a 6.79% decline year to...

headline: Princess Cruises Introduces "POURS," a Signature Beverage Collection Reimagining Premium Cocktails and Wellness-Forward Zero-Proof Creations
summary: Princess Cruises announces the launch of POURS, a completely refreshed, signature beverage program that enhances the onboard guest experience through a curated selection of balanced founder-led premium spirits and innovative zero-proof and nonalcoholic beverage offerings.
